projects.title: Loki Interface — Whole-Slide Image Analysis Platform
projects.description: Engineered a full-stack interactive platform on top of Loki, a published AI framework (Nature Methods, 2025) for spatial transcriptomics and histopathology. The platform enables researchers to run deep learning inference on gigapixel whole-slide H&E images directly from the browser — no local Python environment or CLI required.
highlights: Built a Dash/React frontend that interfaces with Loki's deep learning inference pipeline for nuclei segmentation and cell-type annotation on gigapixel whole-slide histopathology images.
Streamed and rendered gigapixel whole-slide images interactively in the browser with color-coded cell-type overlays.
Integrated an LLM-powered AI chatbot for on-demand pathological interpretation of segmented cell types and tissue microenvironments.

projects.title: Mjolnir — Gene Expression Visualization Platform
projects.description: Designed and deployed a data visualization platform using Python (Dash, Plotly) for interactive exploration of multimodal datasets. Integrated gigapixel histology images with gene expression and pathway enrichment results. Co-authored a Research Square preprint describing the platform's role in spatial data analysis.

projects.title: Visual–Omics Model Integration & Data Curation
projects.description: Curated and processed a multimodal dataset linking histology images with spatial gene expression across 32 organs. Built Python scripts and diagnostics to evaluate ML model predictions and validate biological relevance. Contributed to a Nature Methods publication on foundation models.

projects.title: Macrophage Single-Cell Analysis
projects.description: Applied clustering (Leiden) and dimensionality reduction (UMAP) to single-cell data for cell-type identification. Conducted marker gene analysis to assess treatment impacts on immune cell subtypes. Automated preprocessing pipelines in Python.

projects.title: COVID-19 RNA-seq Analysis
projects.description: Cleaned and analyzed RNA-seq data with TopHat, Cuffdiff, and custom Python scripts. Conducted differential expression analysis and visualized results with heatmaps, volcano plots, and bar charts. Built a Gene Ontology tool in Python.
